title: Basics® Comfort-Time™ Ultra Multi-Tilter Chairs MVL1873
brand_hint: Likely OTG / Offices to Go / Basics (Global)

specs.manufacturer: Global Furniture Group / Basics (Global Upholstery Co., Inc.)
specs.materials: Upholstered seat and back, fabric or Fusion Fabric
finishes_available: Fusion Fabric (multiple colours incl. Cobalt, Cherry Blossom)
key_features: Multi-tilt mechanism with infinite-position tilt lock
Fully adjustable G5 arms (height, width, rotation)
Independent seat and back angle adjustment
Adjustable back angle and back-height adjustment
High-back design (with or without headrest option)
specs.notes: Sold via Basics dealer network (Brant Basics, MicroAge, Supreme, Cowan's). Base SKU is MVL1873; suffixes encode upholstery (FU* = Fusion Fabric)
